io_k8s_api_core_v1_ConfigMap_data.io_k8s_api_core_v1_ConfigMap_data_String:
policy.yaml:apiVersion: "descheduler/v1alpha2"
kind: "DeschedulerPolicy"
profiles:
  - name: ProfileName
    pluginConfig:
    - name: "RemovePodsViolatingNodeAffinity"
      args:
        nodeAffinityType:
        - "preferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution"
    plugins:
      deschedule:
        enabled:
          - "RemovePodsViolatingNodeAffinity"
